drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
agenda-group "gb"
when
    ( $p0_0 : T1($b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0) and T1($b0_1_0 : f0) and exists T0(f0 != $b0_0_0) )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T1($b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0) and T1($b0_1_0 : f0, f0 < -2.5) and exists T0(f0 != $b0_0_0) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p0_0.getF1(), $b0_0_0));
    insertLogical(new T2(7, true));
end
rule "R1"
when
    accumulate( T2(f1 == false, $s1_0 : f0); $a1_0 : sum($s1_0) )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( $p2_0 : T0() )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T0() )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T0(f0 == false) )
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
